author: Joe Gaither
name: FP16 Embed + Sliding Window Eval + Warmdown Tuning
blurb: Combine three orthogonal improvements: fp16 tied embedding passthrough to eliminate quantization degradation on the output head, sliding window evaluation (stride=64) for near-maximum context per scored token, and warmdown/LR schedule tuning (3600 iters, 0.06 matrix LR) for better convergence under the 10-min cap.
note: Pending 8xH100 verification run. Estimated val_bpb ~1.187 based on component-level improvements.
